text.t: [Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: 1

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: Name should be Misericorde Reply: There was bound to be some typos somewhere with all that typing. Thanks for catching it.

Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: This information is wrong. Azur's staff is in Raya Lucaria; Lusat's staff is in Sellia in a chest behind the Nox Swordstress & Nox Priest boss fight.
